topics.query_ar: شرح Lossless join and dependency preservation قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Verifying that a relational decomposition mathematically preserves all original functional dependencies requires complex closure calculations.

topics.topic_en: Multivalued Dependencies and Fourth Normal Form (4NF)
topics.topic_ar: الاعتماديات متعددة القيم والنموذج الطبيعي الرابع (4NF)
topics.reason: Grasping how independent multiple values for a single key cause redundancy requires shifting away from standard functional dependency logic.

topics.topic_en: Join Dependencies and Fifth Normal Form (5NF)
topics.query_en: Join dependencies and Fifth Normal Form 5NF tutorial
topics.reason: 5NF involves complex n-way decompositions where a table cannot be split into two tables but can be split into three or more, which is highly counter-intuitive.

topics.query_en: Domain-Key Normal Form DKNF database theory
topics.query_ar: شرح Domain-Key Normal Form DKNF قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: DKNF is a theoretical ultimate normal form that is difficult to apply practically, making its abstract constraints hard to visualize.
